member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioOptions
member.summary: Audio processing options for microphone or custom audio sources.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.BundlePolicy
member.summary: Controls how media streams are bundled on a single transport.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.CandidateNetworkPolicy
member.summary: Controls which network types are used for ICE candidates.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.IceTransportsType
member.summary: Controls which ICE candidate types are used.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.MediaConstraints
member.summary: Media constraints used when creating offers, answers, or sources.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcConfiguration
member.summary: Configuration for creating a peer connection.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcConfigurationExtensions
member.summary: Fluent helpers for configuring peer connection settings.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.SdpSemantics
member.summary: Specifies SDP semantics (Plan B vs Unified Plan).

member.name: T:LumenRTC.TcpCandidatePolicy
member.summary: Controls whether TCP candidates are gathered.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.ConvenienceApi
member.summary: Entry point for the high-level Convenience API.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.CoreApi
member.summary: Entry point for the low-level Core API.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.CoreRtcOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a Core API runtime session.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.CoreRtcSession
member.summary: Core API session that exposes native runtime and factory primitives directly.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.LogSeverity
member.summary: Logging severity for native WebRTC output.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.LumenRtc
member.summary: Static entry point for initializing and terminating the native WebRTC runtime.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcContext
member.summary: Manages the native runtime and a peer connection factory lifetime.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcContextOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a managed WebRTC runtime context.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcLogging
member.summary: Configures native WebRTC logging callbacks and verbosity.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioDevice
member.summary: Wraps the native audio device module for device selection and volume.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DesktopDevice
member.summary: Enumerates desktop sources for screen/window capture.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DesktopMediaList
member.summary: Snapshot list of desktop capture sources.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.MediaSource
member.summary: Represents a desktop capture source (screen or window).

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnectionFactory
member.summary: Creates peer connections, tracks, and device sources.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnectionFactoryExtensions
member.summary: Convenience helpers for creating peer connections and local tracks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoCapturer
member.summary: Captures frames from a camera device.

member.name: P:LumenRTC.Internal.LumenRtcJsonContext.Boolean
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:LumenRTC.Internal.LumenRtcJsonContext.StringArray
member.summary: Defines the source generated JSON serialization contract metadata for a given type.

member.name: P:LumenRTC.Internal.LumenRtcJsonContext.Default
member.summary: The default associated with a default instance.

member.name: P:LumenRTC.Internal.LumenRtcJsonContext.GeneratedSerializerOptions
member.summary: The source-generated options associated with this context.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioFrame
member.summary: PCM audio frame data delivered by audio sinks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioSink
member.summary: Receives audio frames from a track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioSource
member.summary: Audio source used to create local audio tracks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioSourceType
member.summary: Selects microphone or custom audio source mode.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.AudioTrackOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a local audio track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.CameraTrackOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a local camera track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DesktopType
member.summary: Selects screen or window capture mode.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.LocalAudioTrack
member.summary: Convenience wrapper for a local audio track and its source.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.LocalTrackLifecycleState
member.summary: Lifecycle state of a local track wrapper.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.LocalVideoTrack
member.summary: Convenience wrapper for a local video track and its capture pipeline.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.MediaStream
member.summary: Collection of audio and video tracks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.MediaType
member.summary: Media kind used in RTP and peer connection APIs.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.ScreenTrackOptions
member.summary: Options for creating a local screen share track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.TrackState
member.summary: Lifecycle state of a media track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoFrame
member.summary: Video frame handle provided by sinks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoFrameFormat
member.summary: Pixel format used when converting video frames.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoSink
member.summary: Receives video frames from a track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoSource
member.summary: Video source used to create local video tracks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DataChannel
member.summary: RTC data channel for arbitrary message transport.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DataChannelInit
member.summary: Initialization parameters for a data channel.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DataChannelMessage
member.summary: Message payload delivered by a data channel callback.

member.name: M:LumenRTC.DataChannelMessage.#ctor(System.ReadOnlyMemory{System.Byte},System.Boolean)
member.summary: Message payload delivered by a data channel callback.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnection
member.summary: Timeout-aware async wrappers for peer connection operations.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnectionBuilder
member.summary: Fluent builder for creating peer connections with callbacks and defaults.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnectionExtensions
member.summary: Convenience helpers for working with peer connections.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.PeerConnectionState
member.summary: Overall state of a peer connection.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.SdpTypeExtensions
member.summary: Helpers for converting SDP types to and from strings.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.SignalingState
member.summary: Signaling state as defined by WebRTC.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DegradationPreference
member.summary: Preference for video quality degradation behavior.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DtlsTransportInfo
member.summary: DTLS transport information for an RTP sender or receiver.

member.name: M:LumenRTC.DtlsTransportInfo.#ctor(LumenRTC.DtlsTransportState,System.Int32,System.Int32)
member.summary: DTLS transport information for an RTP sender or receiver.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DtmfSender
member.summary: Sends DTMF tones over an audio RTP sender.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.DtmfToneChange
member.summary: DTMF tone change payload emitted by sender callbacks.

member.name: M:LumenRTC.DtmfToneChange.#ctor(System.String,System.String)
member.summary: DTMF tone change payload emitted by sender callbacks.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpCapabilities
member.summary: Supported RTP codecs and header extensions.

member.summary: Supported RTP codecs and header extensions.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpEncodingInfo
member.summary: Effective encoding settings reported by RTP sender or receiver.

member.summary: Effective encoding settings reported by RTP sender or receiver.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpEncodingSettings
member.summary: Encoding settings applied to RTP senders.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpReceiver
member.summary: RTP receiver for a remote media track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpSender
member.summary: RTP sender for a local media track.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpTransceiver
member.summary: RTP transceiver combining sender and receiver.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpTransceiverDirection
member.summary: Direction of media flow for a transceiver.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtpTransceiverInit
member.summary: Initialization parameters for creating a transceiver.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.Simulcast
member.summary: Helpers for common simulcast encoding configurations.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoQuality
member.summary: Helper for selecting presets based on resolution.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.VideoQualityPreset
member.summary: Represents a video quality preset for encoding.

member.name: M:LumenRTC.VideoQualityPreset.#ctor(System.String,System.Int32,System.Double,System.Double,LumenRTC.DegradationPreference,LumenRTC.RtpPriority,System.Double,System.Nullable{System.Int32},System.String)
member.summary: Represents a video quality preset for encoding.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcStat
member.summary: Single stats entry from a WebRTC stats report.

member.name: T:LumenRTC.RtcStatQuery
member.summary: Query options for filtering stats report entries.

member.name: M:LumenRTC.RtcStatQuery.#ctor(System.String,System.String,System.String,System.Nullable{System.UInt32},System.Func{LumenRTC.RtcStat,System.Boolean})
member.summary: Query options for filtering stats report entries.
